jd_text: About The Job Category Manager – IT We are currently partnering with a leading organization in the region to hire an experienced Category Manager – IT Procurement . This is a strategic role reporting to the Chief Procurement Officer, responsible for leading IT category strategy across hardware, software, telecom, cloud, SaaS, and technology services. Key Responsibilities Category Strategy & Planning Develop and implement IT category strategies aligned with organizational goals Conduct spend analysis, supplier benchmarking, and market intelligence Identify cost-saving and value-creation opportunities Drive Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) optimization initiatives Strategic Sourcing & Supplier Management Lead end-to-end sourcing (RFPs, RFQs, RFIs) Negotiate pricing, SLAs, and commercial terms Deliver savings targets aligned with annual objectives Manage preferred supplier programs Monitor vendor performance through KPIs and SLA Contract Management & Compliance Draft, review, and negotiate IT contracts in collaboration with Legal and IT Ensure compliance with procurement policies and regulations Manage renewals, licensing, and subscription agreements Mitigate cybersecurity, data privacy, and vendor dependency risks Stakeholder Engagement Partner with IT, Finance, Legal, and business units Support digital transformation initiatives Act as procurement lead for IT-related projects Financial & Performance Management Manage and forecast IT category spend Track and report savings and procurement KPIs Support budgeting and planning cycles Risk & Governance Conduct supplier risk and business continuity assessments Ensure compliance with information security standards Maintain documentation and audit trails What Were Looking For Qualifications Bachelors Degree (CIPS Level 4 desirable) Experience 5–7 years of experience in IT procurement within a similar or larger organization Skills & Competencies Strong negotiation and commercial acumen Experience in matrix environments Ability to engage and influence senior stakeholders Strong communication skills (verbal & written) Demonstrated ability to articulate Procurements value proposition Fluent in English
